properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I have a friend, a faithful friend And Jesus is His name, He will not leave, He stands by me, My Shepherd, He remains.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have a friend, a mighty friend And Jesus is His name, I shall not fear, He holds me near, His strength will keep me safe.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His name is True King, Lord of Creation, Ruler without end, I call Him Hope, Peace, Wonderful Savior, And what joy that Jesus calls me friend.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I have a friend, the kindest friend And Jesus is His name, He hears my cry by day or night, And wipes my tears away.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His name is True King, Lord of Creation, Ruler without end, I call Him Hope, Peace, Wonderful Savior, And what joy that Jesus calls me friend, He calls me friend.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I have a friend, a Savior friend, And Jesus is His name, He fought for me on Calvary, And trampled on the grave.
